title: Replay an entity to check offline/online skew
description: Steps to pull an entity's offline and online feature vectors and diff them to catch skew before serving.
body: Use when validating that a feature serves identically offline and online. Do not trust that one definition guarantees equality — materialization bugs and stale syncs cause divergence. Actions: pick a known entity, fetch its offline backfilled vector and its online-served vector at the same timestamp, diff field by field, and assert equality in a test. Validation signals include a passing skew test for the entity and a diff report showing zero mismatches. Risk boundary: undetected skew silently degrades production; if the diff is non-zero, treat the feature as unsafe to serve and escalate to fix materialization before release.
